'''nagowo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:fibrinoid|fibrinoid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-g-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fibrinoid|fibrinoid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| nagowo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || nægeweth || nægewej || nægewesh || nægewe
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || nagogowoth || nagogowoj || nagogowosh || nagogowo
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || nagowoth || nagowoj || nagowosh || nagowo
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || nagofwofth || nagofwofj || nagofwofsh || nagofwof
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || nagowotho || nagowojo || nagowosho || nagowoko
|-
| [[Patient]] || nagowoth || nagowoj || nagowosh || nagowo
|-
| [[Possessive]] || nagowothol || nagowojol || nagowoshol || nagowokol
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || nagowoothotho || nagowoojojo || nagowooshosho || nagowooko
|-
| [[Dative]] || nagowothon || nagowojon || nagowoshon || nagowokon
|-
| [[Speaker]] || nagowothooro || nagowojooro || nagowoshooro || nagowokooro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
